testcase.name: testReleaseDateSorting

failure.message: Sorting by Release Date failed to alter list state. did not expect [Chart insights] but found [Chart insights]

Removed 29 stack frames

testcase.name: testSortDirectionToggle

testcase.name: testDeepLinkNavigation
